Quality Education.reason: Course provides foundational skills in statistics, supporting Target 4.4 ('relevant skills for employment').
As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops 'fundamental skills for data analysis' for future employment (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills in 'Data science' and 'data analysis,' which are high-value skills for achieving productive employment and decent work (Targets 8.2, 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: As a 'fundamental pillar' of 'Data science,' the course enhances scientific research and technological capabilities, directly supporting innovation as per Target 9.5.
